description:
Info-survey verdict gate on survey.user_input. Fires when the info
survey is submitted (state → 'done'):
- Fail (scoring_success False) → archive + failure email if office
  hours, or queue the refusal in x_studio_queued_refusal_id off hours.
- Pass → advance to Stage 7 (Assessment Sent). Score ≥ 90 → flag as
  Star Talent (priority=high).
- Zombie recovery: re-activate archived applicants if their survey
  arrives late.

Pure procedural — no closures.

x_studio_queued_refusal_id (Char on hr.applicant) already exists on
every target env.

model_id=662 = hr.applicant ir.model (verified consistent across envs).
